info.description: Editorial numbered list — large italic numerals with a heading and paragraph per item. Used for 'What you'll learn', '5 things to know', programme curricula, etc.

eyebrow.description: Small uppercase label above the title. Example: 'Inside REGULATED · You will learn'. Leave blank to hide.

heading.description: Section heading above the list. Example: 'A new pay-what-you-feel course.'

items.description: The numbered entries. Add as many as you need. Number is auto-assigned by position — 01, 02, 03...

style.description: Optional background colour, padding, max width for this section.
